Subject: Urgent Notice: Your Account Has Been Compromised

Dear [Username],

We are writing to inform you that your account has been compromised and we need you to take immediate action to secure it. We have detected suspicious activity on your account and we believe that your login credentials have been stolen and used to access your account.

To protect your account and your personal information, we strongly recommend that you change your password immediately. Please click on the link below to reset your password and secure your account.

[Link to phishing website]

If you do not change your password within the next 24 hours, we will be forced to suspend your account until you can verify your identity. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause, but we must take these measures to ensure the security of your account.

Please note that this email was sent from an untrusted source and should not be clicked on or opened. We recommend that you delete this email immediately and do not click on any links or provide any personal information.

If you believe that your account has been compromised, please contact our support team immediately at [support email address].

Thank you for your
